title: Update currency to INR and add food category with delivery options

requirements.text: Change the price display and input from USD to Indian Rupees (INR) throughout the application. Update all price labels to show '₹' symbol or 'INR' instead of 'USD'. This includes ProductCard, ProductDetail, CartItem, ShoppingCart order summary, OrderConfirmation, and the CreateProduct form.

quotes: price is in usd make it in Indian rupees

acceptanceCriteria: All price displays show '₹' symbol or 'INR' label instead of '$' or 'USD'
Product creation form labels price input as 'Price (INR)' or similar
Cart and checkout pages show prices in INR
Order confirmation displays total in INR

requirements.text: Add 'Food' as a new product category option. This category should appear in the category dropdown when creating products and in the category filter navigation on the product catalog page.

quotes: add 1 more category that it is a food product

acceptanceCriteria: CreateProduct form includes 'Food' in the category dropdown
Product catalog navigation shows 'Food' as a filterable category
Products can be created with 'Food' category and displayed correctly

requirements.text: Add a delivery type field to products with two options: '1-hour delivery' and 'Takeaway'. Include this field in the product creation form, product data model in the backend, and display it on product cards and detail pages.

quotes: add 1 more category that it is delivery in 1 hour or takeaway

acceptanceCriteria: CreateProduct form includes a delivery type selector with '1-hour delivery' and 'Takeaway' options
Backend Product type includes a deliveryType field
ProductCard shows the delivery type for each product
ProductDetail page displays the delivery type information
Existing products handle the new field gracefully (default or migration)

constraints: Preserve all existing product data during schema updates
Maintain backward compatibility with existing products when adding delivery type field
nonGoals: Implementing actual delivery tracking or logistics
Creating separate ordering flows for delivery vs takeaway
